nodes.name: Receive Webhook
nodes.notes: Register this URL in Botsab: PUT /instances/:id/webhooks  {"url":"http://n8n:5678/webhook/botsab-assistant","events":["message.received"]}

nodes.name: Ack Webhook
nodes.notes: Closes the HTTP connection immediately so Botsab's dispatcher doesn't time out. Processing continues in the background.

nodes.name: Build AI Request
nodes.notes: Change model to 'claude-sonnet-4-6' for higher quality. Edit SYSTEM prompt to match your group's purpose.

nodes.name: Call Claude AI
nodes.notes: On error: falls through to error output (index 1) → Error Fallback node.
